name: Dog Fest Turkey Meat Bones (55G)
description: Our famous chewy bone for small breeds is made with delicious turkey meat. Turkey would be an excellent choice for those with sensitive stomach or allergies. Composition: turkey, rawhide, vegetable by-products, minerals. Analytical constituents, %: crude protein 35, crude fat 6.5, crude fiber 0.2, crude ash 3, moisture 18.
